SEALSQ completes $25.0 million offering to investors, total gross proceeds this week amount to $60.0 million. No new offerings for 60 days.
news.summary: SEALSQ Corp, a multinational company based in Geneva, Switzerland, specializing in Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology, recently closed a registered direct offer for 13,157,896 ordinary shares on the NASDAQ exchange under the symbol LAES. The public offering price was set at $1.90 per share, generating $25.0 million in gross proceeds. This latest offering adds to a total of $60.0 million raised this week through various financing activities. In light of these recent transactions, SEALSQ has indicated that there are no immediate plans for another registered direct offering of ordinary shares for at least the next 60 days.

news.headline: Tampa General Hospital partners with evolvedMD to integrate mental health providers at TGH locations for improved access.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, on December 19, 2024, Tampa General Hospital (TGH) announced a partnership with Scottsdale-based company evolvedMD to incorporate licensed mental health providers into Tampa General Medical Group locations. This collaboration aims to enhance the accessibility of behavioral health care services for patients. The initiative seeks to improve convenience for patients seeking mental health support by integrating these services within TGH facilities. This partnership marks a significant step in addressing mental health needs, with the ultimate goal of providing quality care to individuals in need.

news.headline: WildBrain Ltd. shareholders approve all matters at annual meeting in Toronto. All director nominees elected. TSX: WILD.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 19, 2024, WildBrain Ltd. (TSX: WILD), a prominent player in kids' and family entertainment worldwide, announced the successful election of all director nominees as per the management information circular dated November 20, 2024, during its annual meeting.

news.headline: Carriage Services ranked #33 on Forbes' Most Successful Small Companies list for 2025, showcasing growth and innovation.
news.summary: Carriage Services, Inc. (NYSE: CSV) has been named the 33rd Most Successful Small Company for 2025 by Forbes. This recognition showcases the company's dedication to growth, innovation, and serving families with compassion.

news.headline: El Salvador plans to increase Bitcoin purchases despite IMF deal concessions. National Bitcoin Office confirms.
news.summary: El National Bitcoin Office of El Salvador has confirmed that the country will continue purchasing Bitcoin, even after striking a deal with the IMF to adjust certain Bitcoin policies.

Woodward Park Partners helps Salus Group in sale to NFP, a subsidiary of Aon/Dec 19, 2024/Benefits Partner, LLC was acquired by NFP, wholly owned subsidiary of Aon.
news.summary: Woodward Park Partners, located in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan, recently shared that their client, Benefits Partner, LLC operating as Salus Group, has been purchased by NFP, a subsidiary of Aon (NYSE: AON). The acquisition is a significant development in the industry and positions Salus Group, a prominent independent company, under the umbrella of NFP. This acquisition marks a strategic move within the sector, showcasing the value and growth potential of both companies involved.

news.headline: Century Communities to open new community in Flagler Beach, FL, launching two home collections soon.
news.summary: After a successful event, a company is gearing up to introduce two new home collections at Reserve East in FLAGLER BEACH, Florida on December 19, 2024. Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS), a prominent national homebuilder known for its innovative online home sales approach, will be showcasing its latest offerings. This company has been featured on America's Most Watched programs and known for its exceptional track record in the industry.

news.headline: Looking ahead to 2025: Time to move past central bank hawks and doves.

Anticipation of the Fed meeting outcome leads to speculation; similarities to 1996 for S&P 500 discussed.- Last potential rate cut suggested- Possible influence on S&P 500 from 1996- Bracing for hawkish Fed meeting, but concerns of underestimation
news.summary: Investors on Wall Street were prepared for a potentially hawkish Federal Reserve meeting, but the outcome may have surpassed expectations. Speculations suggest this cut could be the final one, drawing comparisons to the market climate of 1996 for the S&P 500.

news.headline: Pets at Home enhances operations with Microsoft Copilot Studio AI, boosting customer experience and efficiency.
news.summary: Pets at Home has integrated Microsoft Copilot Studio into its operations to utilize AI agents, aiming to elevate customer experience and operational efficiency. The collaboration involves the implementation of AI technology to optimize business processes. This move is expected to result in a significant boost in overall performance, with Pets at Home striving to enhance customer service through innovative solutions. The decision to adopt AI-driven tools reflects the company's commitment to staying at the forefront of technological advancements in the retail sector.

news.headline: Orgain voluntarily recalls 30g Protein Organic Powder - Chocolate due to possible peanut residue.
news.summary: Orgain, based in Irvine, California, has initiated a voluntary recall of a specific batch of its 30g Protein Organic Plant Based Powder - Chocolate 2.01lb. The recall is due to the potential presence of undeclared peanut residue in the product. Individuals with a peanut allergy or heightened sensitivity to peanuts...

news.headline: Dow Jones and S&P 500 aim to bounce back, Bitcoin stocks drop, Nvidia rises amid market coverage.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones and S&P 500 saw a rally in an attempt to recover on the stock market. Despite this positive movement, Bitcoin stocks experienced a decline in value while Nvidia's stock price surged. The Dow Jones is working to break its losing streak, showing promise for investors. Live coverage on this market activity can be found online, offering real-time updates for interested parties.

news.headline: Indy Autonomous Challenge returns to CES 2025 with multicar racing, showcasing physical AI collaborations.
news.summary: Indianapolis will host the Indy Autonomous Challenge at CES 2025, featuring multicar racing and advancements in physical AI technology. The event promises to be groundbreaking with participation from various teams and experts. This return is highly anticipated, with attendance expected to surpass previous years, making it a significant event in the autonomous vehicle industry.

news.headline: Correction: Mikko Kemppainen named General Counsel in Orion Group Executive Management Board effective 1 June 2025.
news.summary: Orion Corporation issued a stock exchange release on December 19, 2024, at 22:45 EET, announcing significant changes in their board, management, and auditors. The company reported a major restructuring effort that will involve appointing new directors and executives to key positions. Additionally, Orion Corporation will be bringing on new auditors to oversee their financial reporting processes. These changes mark a significant shift in the leadership and governance structure of the company.

news.headline: Rinnai America donates 5 millionth tankless water heater to Homes For Our Troops in partnership; celebrating 50-year milestone.
news.summary: In celebration of their 50-year anniversary, Rinnai America Corporation, a prominent manufacturer of tankless gas water heaters in North America, commemorated their official supplier status by donating their 5 millionth tankless water heater. The company, headquartered in Peachtree City, Georgia, made this significant contribution on December 19, 2024.

news.headline: Advantage Solutions named a top agency in 2025 by Chief Marketer, alongside their marketing agency Amp.
news.summary: A marketing agency known as Amp, which operates under the Advantage umbrella, has been acknowledged as a leading agency in the field. Amp offers comprehensive marketing services across various channels.

news.headline: Chagrin Falls hosts Popcorn Ball Drop on NYE with 6ft, 230 lb. ball. 2000 to attend. Village rivals Times Square.
news.summary: In the charming historic village of Chagrin Falls, Ohio, around 2000 people are set to come together to ring in the New Year. The highlight of the celebration will be the descent of a six-foot-wide, 230-pound ball. This unique event offers a more intimate alternative to the iconic Waterford Crystal Ball drop in Times Square, making it an accessible and memorable way to welcome the new year.

news.headline: The new Republican stopgap US funding bill extends funding for three months - Punchbowl.
US natural gas prices hit $3.59/MMBtu near 2-year highs, up 9.5% this week. Increased inflation fears as utility costs rise.
news.summary: Natural gas prices in the U.S. surged on Thursday, as the Henry Hub benchmark soared by 6.5% to reach $3.59 per million British units, marking the highest close since January 2023. Prices have climbed by 9.5% since the beginning of the week, signaling the strong possibility of experiencing the eighth week of gains in the past nine. This jump is attributed to significant withdrawals from storage, robust domestic and international demand, and ongoing geopolitical uncertainties in Europe. The upward trend in natural gas prices poses challenges for inflation and the economy, potentially resulting in increased utility bills for American consumers soon. Moreover, investors are troubled by the surge in natural gas prices following a more hawkish Federal Reserve meeting this week. The policymakers raised inflation forecasts for next year and indicated a slower rate of rate cuts. Additionally, the U.S. Energy Information Administration confirmed a third consecutive triple-digit storage drop at 125 billion units.

news.headline: Stopgap has a 2-year debt suspension and disaster aid - Punchbowl.
ADGM sees AUM of USD 635 billion, attracting trillion-dollar club with 19 major announcements at ADFW.
news.summary: In Abu Dhabi, UAE, on December 19, 2024, ADGM, a prominent international financial center and a renowned hub for asset and wealth management, shared nineteen significant updates from global financial institutions at the third edition of ADFW. This event showcased the latest developments and advancements in the financial sector, with key announcements made by various leading organizations.

news.headline: SOLiD receives $27.68M grant for Open RAN project, advancing in-building 5G connectivity.
news.summary: SOLiD has recently made strides in developing O-RAN-compliant technology to enhance in-building 5G connectivity, aiming for increased efficiency and sustainability. Based in Dallas, the company has secured a substantial $27.68 million grant from the U.S. government. This grant will support their efforts to provide advanced solutions for multi-operator mobile coverage within buildings, aligning with the ever-growing demand for seamless and reliable 5G connectivity.

news.headline: BuildWithin creates 7 new registered apprenticeship roles, including AI Prompt Engineering and Startup Entrepreneur Leader.
news.summary: In Washington, BuildWithin, a prominent technology platform for workforce development, has launched seven approved registered apprenticeship positions in collaboration with the U.S. Department of Labor and the District of Columbia. This initiative includes groundbreaking AI Prompt Engineering and Startup Entrepreneur Leader roles, aimed at enhancing talent acquisition for AI and startup enterprises. These additions align with BuildWithin's commitment to addressing the skills gap in emerging sectors and industries.

news.headline: HubSync unveils 2024 product upgrades for tax and accounting automation, solidifying its position as an industry innovator.
news.summary: A press release from Franklin, Tennessee highlighted HubSync as a pioneering force in the tax and accounting automation industry. The company is recognized for its innovative approach towards the future of the sector, emphasizing its advanced technologies and solutions. The announcement aimed to educate both users and media professionals about HubSync's significant role in driving advancements in automation within the tax and accounting realm.

news.headline: GOP deal includes a potential debt limit increase - Politico.
UK court sentences Craig Wright to a suspended one-year term for contempt after claiming to be Bitcoin creator.
news.summary: In March, a UK court decided that Craig Wright was not the creator of Bitcoin known as Satoshi Nakamoto. Despite this ruling, Wright has persisted in filing lawsuits citing his claimed intellectual property rights. The court's decision comes amidst a series of legal battles involving Wright, who has been involved in multiple lawsuits related to the creation and ownership of Bitcoin. The ruling highlights the ongoing controversy surrounding Wright's claims, with the court rejecting his assertions regarding being the mastermind behind the popular cryptocurrency. Wright's lawsuits in connection with intellectual property rights have drawn attention, with critics questioning the legitimacy of his claims. The ruling signifies a significant development in the legal disputes surrounding Wright, who remains embroiled in controversies regarding his alleged connection to Bitcoin.

news.headline: Pye-Barker Fire & Safety acquires Moon Security Services, expanding to Oregon, becoming the US's largest fire protection provider.
news.summary: Pye-Barker Fire & Safety, a leading fire protection, life safety, and security services provider in the US, recently completed the acquisition of Moon Security Services. This move further strengthens Pye-Barker's position as the largest fully integrated company in the industry. The acquisition expands their operations in the Pacific Northwest region. This transaction marks a significant development for Pye-Barker as they continue to grow their presence in the market.

news.headline: Darktrace's EMAIL™ recognized as Challenger in Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Email Security. CAMBRIDGE, UK, Dec. 19, 2024.
news.summary: Darktrace has been recognized as a Challenger in the inaugural Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Email Security Platforms, which assessed companies based on their completeness of vision and ability to execute. The announcement was made on December 19, 2024, in Cambridge, UK. Darktrace, known for its expertise in AI for cybersecurity, introduced Darktrace / EMAIL™, solidifying its position in the market. This acknowledgment highlights the company's commitment to advancing technology and its standing as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: 3 US organizations win $20,000 each in Innovations in Alzheimer's Caregiving Awards. 17th year of awards.
news.summary: Three organizations based in different parts of the United States have been awarded $20,000 each. This announcement was made in San Francisco on December 19, 2024. The awards were given as part of the 17th anniversary of the Innovations in Alzheimer's Caregiving Awards. The recipients of the grants include The Rosalinde and Arthur Gilbert Foundation, Bader Philanthropies, Inc., and Family Caregiver.

The IRS announces 2025 business mileage rate at 70 cents, up from 2024 rate of 67.0 cents, based on Motus data analysis.
news.summary: In Boston, the IRS has released the 2025 business mileage standard rate at 70 cents per mile, based on data from Motus1. The company, known for its vehicle reimbursement and driver risk mitigation solutions, has been influencing the IRS mileage rate since 1981. By examining important automotive trends from the previous year, Motus aids in determining these rates. The 2025 rate has seen an increase from the 2024 rate of 67.0 cents per mile.

news.headline: PMI Foods donates 2,000 briskets to support "Christmas for Chimney Rock", a holiday initiative by CityServe and Paula White.
news.summary: Salt Lake City, December 19, 2024 - Parker Migliorini International ("PMI Foods") has revealed their involvement in "Christmas for Chimney Rock," a charity program organized by CityServe with Paula White. The initiative aims to bring joy during the holidays.

news.headline: CCNY receives 30 pieces of Keith Haring's "Apocalypse" series donated by the Leonard-Litz LGBTQ+ Foundation in 1988.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, The City College of New York received a donation of Keith Haring's Apocalypse series from the Leonard-Litz LGBTQ+ Foundation, as announced by The Foundation for City College. The series comprises 30 unique art pieces that were created by Haring in 1988.

news.headline: Dave Portnoy shared he owns $1.5M Bitcoin and $1.3M XRP, not trading but holding long-term. XRP up 260% YTD.
news.summary: Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy recently revealed that he holds millions of dollars in Bitcoin and XRP, with $1.3 million worth of XRP and 15 BTC valued at around $1.5 million. XRP has seen a significant surge, rising over 100% in the last month and 260% YTD in 2024. Portnoy expressed his investment strategy of holding onto his cryptocurrencies rather than trading them and discussed the optimism surrounding Ripple and XRP's future, particularly with the launch of the USD-backed stablecoin, Ripple USD (RLUSD). The news of RLUSD has helped drive interest in XRP and is expected to carry the story forward to the end of the year.

news.headline: Billionaire proposes plan to save struggling TikTok as options run out.
Jacques Gilbert appointed as Chief Strategy & Business Development Officer at Topcon Healthcare, focusing on Healthcare from the Eye™ initiative.
news.summary: Topcon Healthcare, Inc., a prominent medical devices and digital healthcare solutions company based in Oakland, N.J., has appointed Jacques Gilbert as its Chief Strategy and Business Development Officer. In his new role, Jacques will be responsible for spearheading the advancement and implementation of Topcon Healthcare’s business strategy, with a specific focus on the company’s innovative Healthcare from the Eye™ program. This initiative is a revolutionary connected care ecosystem that harnesses the power of oculomics, the scientific foundation behind AI-powered healthcare solutions. This strategic move underscores Topcon Healthcare's commitment to driving advancements in the healthcare industry.

news.headline: Optimizely ends 2024 with strong growth, aims to enhance products, partnerships, and market position in 2025.
news.summary: A prominent provider of digital experience platforms, Optimizely, is gearing up for 2025 with a firm commitment to enhancing its product range, global collaborations, and market presence. Based in New York, the company is set to fortify its position as a digital experience leader. The milestones achieved by Optimizely are being commended as it embarks on the new year.

news.headline: RCP Advisors acknowledged in Best Places to Work in Money Management awards by Pensions & Investments, promoting employee engagement.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, RCP Advisors, a private equity investment firm specializing in North American small buyout fund managers, was acknowledged in the 2024 Best Places to Work in Money Management awards by Pensions & Investments. This recognition came through the 13th annual survey and recognition program aimed at highlighting top employers in the money management sector. Katie Tarpey, RCP Advisors' Head of Human Resources, expressed gratitude for the honor. The firm focuses on strategic talent management, active employee engagement, and innovative solutions to foster an environment where all employees can excel.
